statement: In every magma, Equation 2814 (`x = ((y * z) * (z * z)) * z`) implies Equation 2062 (`x = ((x * y) * y) * (x * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0856
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op y z) (op z z)) z)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op x y) y) (op x z))
